summary: Adjusted the chapter entry to connect directly to chapter 11's closing promise to 'figure it out' and to clarify that the Wildwood drive begins the next morning. The ending already carried cleanly into chapter 13's strained post-trip silence, so no exit rewrite was needed.
edits: Reframed the opening around June's prior text so the chapter picks up from the previous chapter's final exchange.
Made the overnight transition explicit without changing the chapter's scene order, tone, or plot beats.
